---
title: ""
date: ""
---

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# ::: columns
# ::: {.column width="4%"}
# {{< fa chart-line size=normalsize >}}<br>
# {{< fa code-branch size=normalsize >}}<br>
# {{< fa hard-drive size=small >}}<br>
# {{< fa person-circle-plus size=normalsize >}}<br>
# {{< fa brain size=normalsize >}}<br>
# :::
"{{< fa brain size=normalsize >}}"
```
### Professional Background
::: columns
::: {.column width="100%" .custom-spacing}
- ***Data Science:*** \ Statistical programming; Interactive dashboard design;<br/>
- ***Data Engineering:*** \ End-to-end ETL data pipeline design & automation; Dataset transformations;<br/>
- ***Data Management:*** \ Data centralization and governance; High-performance computing clusters;<br/>
- ***Clinical Trials:*** \ Drug and behavioral interventions in Psychiatry;<br/>
- ***Neuroimaging:*** \ Magnetic Resonance Imaging analysis of the human brain.
:::
:::

### Programming & Tools
::: columns
::: {.column width="46%"}
<i class="fa-brands fa-r-project fa-xs"></i> \ \ R \ (tidyverse, targets, Shiny) \ \ <br/>
<i class="fa-brands fa-python"></i> \ \ Python (pandas, nibabel, scikit-learn)<br/>
![](images/matlab_icon2){.absolute .matlab-icon width="14"} \ \ MATLAB
:::

::: {.column width="36%"}
{{< fa terminal size=xs >}} \ \ Shell Scripting (Bash, zsh)<br/>
<i class="fa-brands fa-git-alt"></i> \ \ Git<br/>
<i class="fa-brands fa-docker fa-sm"></i> \ Docker<br/>
:::

::: {.column width="12%"}
- **XNAT**<br/>
- **FlyWheel**<br/>
- **FSL**
:::
:::

###  Experience

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/usc-shield-red.png){.absolute width="50"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}

**Keck School of Medicine of USC, Los Angeles CA** <br/> 
Programmer Analyst I, *Laboratory of NeuroImaging*  `Jun 2026 - Present`{style="float: right;  font-size: 12px;"}

- [LASI-DAD](https://lasi-dad.org/): Impact of dementia and Alzheimer's disease in the brain in low/middle-income countries (e.g. India) which are understudied in this research field.

Resource Employee, *Laboratory of NeuroImaging*`Jun 2025 - May 2026`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px;"} 

- Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server.
- Centralized multi-site MRI data by deploying and managing an XNAT instance, supporting data governance, querying, and analysis.
:::
:::



::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/chla_logo.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
**Children's Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA** `Jun 2025 - May 2026`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"} 
<br/> Research Assistant, *Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group*

  - [UNITY](https://www.unity-mri.com/): Develop tools to measure infant neurodevelopment from low-cost, portable, ultra-low field MRI scanners.
  - Developed automated, containerized (Docker) neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines.
  - Generated analysis-ready brain MRI datasets for interpretation of neuroimaging signals and machine learning and statistical analyses.
  - Quality control of raw MRI data, cleaned datasets, analyses, and reporting.
:::
:::


::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/mgh_logo.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
`Oct 2022 - Jul 2024`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px"} **Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA** <br/> 
Programmer, *Center for Addiction Medicine*

- Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL data pipelines (with Git), generating clean datasets and statistical results for a drug intervention clinical trial.
- Developed dashboards to monitor data, identify missing or inconsistent data, and improve
visualization of summary statistics.
- EDC research database (REDCap) management; automating data extraction via API integration.
- Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets and metadata to enable cross-cohort analysis.
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/barilan_logo.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
**Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel** `Aug 2020 - Dec 2020`{style="float: right;"} <br/> 
Research Intern, *Developmental Neuropsychology Lab* <br/>

-   Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA.
:::
:::

<br>
